2026-04-08T19:20:41.2997626Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.

2026-04-08T19:20:41.3004559Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-08T19:20:41.3005452Z 
2026-04-08T19:20:41.3005654Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T19:20:41.3005968Z
